blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,533 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
